title: AI/Quantum Investment Ledger — government commitment record
description: One row per announced government (or government-adjacent) AI/quantum investment commitment. The ledger is the product; the index is an optional layer above it. Every figure is tagged on the comparability axes BEFORE any normalization or aggregation. Public and private/mobilized capital are stored as SEPARATE fields and are NEVER summed into a single 'government investment' number.

iso3.description: ISO-3166 alpha-3, or 'EU' for the bloc. Used to join normalization denominators (GDP, population, GBARD).

domain.description: Investment domain. 'semiconductor' is AI-adjacent and flagged so it can be filtered in/out.

headline_amount.description: Headline figure in ORIGINAL currency units (full units, not millions/billions). Null when only a range is given.

amount_low.description: Low end for vague figures ('up to', 'as much as'), original currency. Null if a point figure.

amount_high.description: High end for vague figures, original currency. Null if a point figure.

currency.description: ISO 4217 of the headline figure (USD, EUR, CNY, CAD, GBP, ...).

usd_approx.description: Headline converted to USD at (ideally) announcement-date FX. The comparable headline-stock figure.

fx_rate_to_usd.description: FX rate (1 unit of currency -> USD) used for usd_approx. Null = pending (Stage 2 pins per-record announcement-date rates).

horizon_end_year.description: Null = open-ended. With start_year, lets the generator annualize (usd_approx / years) for flow comparisons while preserving the headline stock.

announced.description: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM of the announcement.

actor_type.description: Nature of the money. 'government_appropriated' = passed a budget; 'mobilization_target' / 'private' = headline is mostly NOT a public outlay.

public_outlay_usd.description: Genuinely-public component of the headline, USD. Null = unknown/unspecified.

private_mobilized_usd.description: Private / 'mobilized' component, USD. Stored separately; NEVER added to public_outlay_usd to form a government figure.

verification_status.description: verified = traced to a primary budget/official doc; reported = credible press, URL may be pending; estimate = third-party modelled; unconfirmed = no reliable primary source.

source_url.description: Primary-source URL. Empty/null = pending verification (verification_status should then be 'reported' at best).

event_key.description: Stable key grouping re-announcements of the SAME money across summits, for dedup. Sum at most one record per event_key.

tradable_share.description: Fraction (0-1) of the commitment that is globally-priced tradable goods (compute/GPUs/hardware), converted at MARKET FX; the remainder (talent/operations/local construction) is non-tradable and converted at PPP in the blended view. Null = use the generator's domain-default map (compute 0.90, semiconductor 0.65, ai 0.55, ai+quantum 0.50, quantum 0.45). Per-record override when line-item detail is known.

notes.description: Caveats: bundling, overlap with other records, opacity, etc.

views.absolute_usd: usd_approx (headline stock) and annualized_usd (stock / horizon years)
views.per_gbard_x: annualized_usd / gbard_usd (multiple of annual government R&D budget; null where gbard unknown)

currency_basis.fx: usd_approx as stored (market FX) — appropriate for tradable compute/hardware
currency_basis.ppp_blended: tradable_share at FX + (1 - tradable_share) at PPP, where USD_ppp = usd_approx / price_level_index. PPP is a SENSITIVITY SCENARIO, not ground truth.
